description: Plane sizing and oversizing system -- visible area calculation per Section 8.3 (visible_height = 2 * d * tan(FOV/2)), camera-motion-dependent oversizing factors to prevent edge reveals during camera movement, edge-reveal prevention math, AND texture-to-plane auto-sizing algorithm per Section 8.9 (how planes adapt dimensions from loaded texture aspect ratios while maintaining geometry spatial structure -- letterbox vs crop vs scale decisions).
notes: Tier 3 spatial feature. Spec defines two pure-math modules: plane-sizing.ts (texture-to-plane auto-sizing with contain/cover/stretch modes) and edge-reveal.ts (sampling-based validation for facing-camera planes, analytical oversize factor from OversizeRequirements, margin computation). Rotated planes explicitly skipped in V1 with documented skipReason. 39 acceptance criteria. Deliberation resolved 11 issues across 6 rounds.
